caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 85% rain probability with winds of 22 kt and wave heights of 5.1 ft, while Grenada has less than 10% rain probability with winds of 14 kt. I expect the Eastern Caribbean to see the most significant impacts from this system, particularly in ports like St. Thomas, where the high rain probability and moderate winds will require careful planning for safe navigation.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Dubrovnik
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 16 kt and wave heights of 5.4 ft, while nearby Naples has a less intense system with winds at 13 kt. I expect these conditions to impact port operations in the Central Mediterranean, particularly in Dubrovnik, where the higher winds and wave heights will require careful navigation.
